description: AgriOS brand override + content preset. Keeps the standard teal/cyan accent-primary and semantic traffic-light statuses; substitutes AgriOS/ATOM/Nirmata Holdings identity and General Sans + JetBrains Mono type. No fabricated investor metrics — figures surface only from live ingestion/model metadata at runtime.

flagshipProducts: Command Center — live agricultural crisis picture
Theater Map — geospatial risk & event overlay
Food War Simulation — scenario stress modeling

content.strategicNarrative: AgriOS turns fragmented global food-system signals into a command-grade operating picture, with ATOM synthesizing observed, modeled, and live data into decisions.
moatLayers: Scenario simulation tied to real baselines
complianceOrTrustSignals: No secret exposure in logs, responses, or provenance URLs
